on_screen_text: Speak fast and clear : Ami English shikhte chai, karon amar onek boro shopno ache. Ami ekta bhalo job pete chai, taka earn korte chai, aar amar family ke help korte chai. Ami nijer opor proud feel korte chai. Ami bhalo kore English bolte chai, onek desh ghurte chai, aar notun manusher sathe dekha korte chai. Ami jani English ekta better life er key. Kokhono ami tired feel kori. Kokhono ami lazy hoye jai. Kokhono English book dekhe bored lage. Kintu ami nijeke boli: \"Keep going.\" Aaj jodi shudhu 10 minute MySivi te practice kori, tao ami better hobo. Jodi bhul kori, MySivi er AI teacher amake shei bhul theke shikhte help korbe. Amake perfect hote hobe na. Amake shudhu try korte hobe. Step by step, day by day, MySivi amake grow korte help kore. Jokhon mon kharap hoy, ami mone kori keno start korechilam. Ami amar goals mone kori. Ami MySivi open kori, ekta deep breath nei, aar abar shuru kori. English shekha easy noy, kintu MySivi etake worth it banaye. Proti notun sentence ekta chhoto victory. AI er sathe sob kotha amar shopner aro kache niye jay. Ami onnoder sathe nijeke compare kori na. Ami sudhu kaler amar sathe aajker amake compare kori. MySivi protidin amar progress dekhay. Ami nijer opor believe kori. Ami jani ami parbo. Ekdin ami pichone takiye bolbo: \"Haan, ami perechi. Ami give up kori ni.\" Tai aaj ami MySivi er sathe cholar decision nilam. Karon amar future depend kore ami aaj ki kori tar opor. Ami chai amar future bright hok. Tumi o MySivi download kore tomar English Journey start korte paro Just ₹3 te. Eta already 50 lakh+ manush ke English shikhte help koreche. Download MySivi Now. Tomar bright future aaj thekei shuru hocche. [Speak fast and clear : I want to learn English, because I have a very big dream. I want to get a good job, earn money, and help my family. I want to feel proud of myself. I want to speak English well, travel to many countries, and meet new people. I know English is the key to a better life. Sometimes I feel tired. Sometimes I get lazy. Sometimes I feel bored looking at English books. But I tell myself: \"Keep going.\" If I practice on MySivi for just 10 minutes today, I will still be better. If I make a mistake, MySivi's AI teacher will help me learn from that mistake. I don't have to be perfect. I just have to try. Step by step, day by day, MySivi helps me grow. When I feel down, I remember why I started. I remember my goals. I open MySivi, take a deep breath, and start again. Learning English is not easy, but MySivi makes it worth it. Every new sentence is a small victory. Every conversation with the AI brings me closer to my dream. I don't compare myself with others. I only compare my today's self with my yesterday's self. MySivi shows my progress every day. I believe in myself. I know I can do it. One day I will look back and say: \"Yes, I did it. I didn't give up.\" So today I decided to walk with MySivi. Because my future depends on what I do today. I want my future to be bright. You too can download MySivi and start your English Journey for just ₹3. It has already helped 50 lakh+ people learn English. Download MySivi Now. Your bright future starts today.]
summary: A motivational text-only ad in Romanized Bengali encouraging users to learn English daily with MySivi's AI teacher. It highlights personal growth, overcoming laziness, and tracking progress. The call to action invites users to start their learning journey for just ₹3.
